matched_strings:
with m (SdkMessageId,Name)
as 
(
select SdkMessageId, Name 
from SdkMessageBase
where Name in ('Create','Retrieve','RetrieveMultiple','Update','Delete')
)
select f.PrimaryObjectTypeCode, m.Name, f.IsVisible
from SdkMessageFilterBase f 
join m on (f.SdkMessageId = m.SdkMessageId)
and f.CustomizationLevel = 0
